description_long: This piano features a glossy black exterior with a prominent red panel on one side, likely the fallboard or side panel. The keyboard is visible and appears to be full-sized, with alternating white and black keys, and some sheet music or decorative elements placed above the keys. The top of the piano has an angular, irregularly shaped lid, which is partially open, revealing some of the internal structure. The rear and side views show a combination of black and red surfaces, with some exposed wooden or brown structural elements, possibly the legs or support braces. The overall form is upright and compact, suitable for placement in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public squares. The piano's surfaces are mostly hard and glossy, with some matte or textured areas on the red panel.
description: A glossy black upright piano with a red side panel, visible keyboard, and partially open lid, featuring some sheet music or decorative items above the keys.
description_view_0: The front view shows the keyboard, sheet music, and the main glossy black body with a red accent.
description_view_1: The side/rear view reveals the underside, some brown structural elements, and the partially open lid.
description_view_2: The back view highlights the large red panel and the angular shape of the lid.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays mostly black surfaces and the rear structure, with less detail on the keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard piano keyboard with alternating white and black keys, approximately 52 white and 36 black keys, no visible missing or split keys.
